untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires multi-candle analysis (4-5 candles with specific body/close relationships, gap detection, and relative positioning across bars). Available indicators cannot precisely encode: (1) detection of gap between candles, (2) relative body size comparisons across multiple prior bars, (3) close positioning within a specific prior gap range, (4) the sequential logic of 3 candles with higher closes followed by reversal. Recommend implementing as custom candlestick pattern detector.
translation_notes: Attempted entry approximation uses tall white candle (body > ATR) and gap-like behavior (close > prev_high), with exit on reversal (close > prev_close). This is a simplified heuristic that does not capture the full pattern complexity. The bearish breakaway is inherently a multi-bar pattern that requires lookback across 4+ candles with specific gap and relative close/body constraints.
